metadata.title: Changelog — What's New in Billix
metadata.description: See the latest updates, features, and improvements to Billix. We ship new capabilities weekly to help you automate more with less effort.

heading.title: Changelog
heading.description: Stay up to date with the latest improvements, features, and fixes. We’re constantly refining Billix to make your workflow faster, smoother, and more powerful.
